global_context.scene_description: A realistic top-down photograph of a light-wood kitchen table in a Phoenix-area home, shot from directly overhead. Two printed HVAC quote documents lie flat side by side on the table, each on plain white letter-size paper. LEFT document is printed on letterhead reading 'PREMIER HOME SERVICES' at the top in bold black type, showing one visible line item 'Trane XR16 3-Ton AC System — 10yr Warranty' and below it in bold black type 'TOTAL: $14,500'. The '$14,500' total has a hand-drawn red pen circle around it. RIGHT document is printed on letterhead reading 'ASH COOLING & HEATING' at the top in bold black type, showing the SAME line item 'Trane XR16 3-Ton AC System — 10yr Warranty' and below it in bold black type 'TOTAL: $9,800'. The '$9,800' total has a hand-drawn green pen circle around it. Directly in the space between the two documents (roughly in the center of the image, horizontally), a hand-drawn red marker arrow points from left to right. Above the arrow, in bold red handwritten marker text: 'YOU SAVE $4,700'. Ambient props: a matte cream ceramic coffee mug sits in the upper-left corner (partially cropped), a red felt-tip marker rests to the left of the left document, a green felt-tip marker rests to the right of the right document. Soft diagonal morning light from a window at upper-left casts gentle shadows toward the lower-right. Across the very top 15% of the frame — OVERLAID on a clean dark-navy bar — bold white sans-serif headline text reads 'SAME EQUIPMENT. LOWER PRICE.' Across the very bottom 12% of the frame — OVERLAID as a solid red rectangular banner — bold white sans-serif text reads 'BEAT MY QUOTE →' on the left and the ASH Cooling & Heating logo appears on the right.

composition.framing: Medium overhead — table fills full frame, two documents centered side by side
composition.focal_point: The contrast between '$14,500' (red circle) and '$9,800' (green circle), with red arrow and 'YOU SAVE $4,700' between them
composition.notes: Reserve top 15% for dark-navy headline bar. Reserve bottom 12% for red CTA banner. Middle 73% contains the table scene with both quotes side-by-side.
